markschemeHtml:
Award [1] for each valid characteristic:

  • single or dominant firm in the market OR market power/price-setting power
  • no close substitutes
  • significant barriers to entry.

Any other valid characteristic.

meta.title: State two assumed characteristics of a monopoly.
